content.en:
Allah the Immortal did not come out of the abyss of destruction, and the greatest possibility is death.

Subsequently, the Protoss confirmed through various means that Allah the Immortal had really fallen into the world in the abyss of destruction, and could not be resurrected at all.

Because, when a living soul dies, the soul mark will be recovered by the origin of the universe, so that it can be resurrected.

Even if Allah the Immortal stores a trace of his soul on a treasure such as Zichen Wood, if the soul mark dissipates, that trace of soul is equivalent to rootless duckweed, which is of no use at all, and cannot be used to resurrect Allah.

Therefore, the world where Allah the Immortal falls in the abyss of destruction is really a fall.

Although the Protoss was very annoyed, there was nothing they could do, and this matter slowly passed.

And since then, there is no longer a rebel of the Protoss, but the strength of the Protoss still crushes other races, and it is still the number one super clan.

......

After Ye Tian came back, he began to comprehend and cultivate the Spear of the Hell Divine Sky, as well as a newly selected time supernatural power, the Wheel of Time!

The Wheel of Time is a time power, once it hits an enemy, it can pull the enemy into the loop of time, and use the rules of time to constantly annihilate the enemy's vitality.

If the enemy is weak and cannot escape the time loop, the consciousness will be completely trapped in the time loop, unable to get rid of it, and eventually die.

If you cast the Wheel of Time in the middle of a battle, you can definitely turn the tide of battle.

And the time cultivator who knows the time great divine power is also called the most terrifying cultivator, and no one wants to fight with such a cultivator.

If it was before, Ye Tian would not have been able to practice the Wheel of Time at all, and he even had the Hell Divine Sky Spear by luck using the Space Source Fragment and the Empty Heavenly Dao Script.

If he was allowed to find the Heavenly Dao Text of Time again, he would not be so lucky.

And now, he has refined a trace of the origin of the universe, and he no longer needs to look for the Heavenly Dao text, and he can cultivate a great divine power at will, even including the time great divine power.

"Start cultivating!"

Ye Tian entered a state of frantic cultivation.

Time passed day by day, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the wheel of time, from the beginning of the confusion, he slowly understood, and finally had a understanding.

A hundred years have passed in a flash!

this day.

Ye Tian's excited cries echoed in the cultivation room.

"Hahaha, I have finally practiced the Wheel of Time!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

The Wheel of Time was trained, and Ye Tian's strength went one step further.

"If I can cultivate the Hell Divine Sky Spear to the Xiaocheng realm, then my strength will be even stronger. Moreover, the Heavenly Moon Knife Peerless Technique can continue to be perfected, making its power even more terrifying. This period of time is my period of rapid progress, I can cultivate well, and I am not in a hurry to hit the galaxy level!" Ye Tian said darkly.

At the same time, Ye Tian often used that strange water quality to take a bath, so that his body constantly matched with the power of the Chaos Dao.

There is almost no limit to this fit, and although the effect will get lower and lower, it is still very effective overall.

In addition, Ye Tian also gave his wife Xiao Yue some strange water quality and asked her to soak it too, which would be very beneficial for her to master her own avenue in the future.

In addition to these cultivations, Ye Tian did not forget to cultivate the Tiangang Battle Method!

Tiangang's battle method is very powerful, if he practices all the nine forms, his battle will increase to an extremely terrifying level, so this supreme battle method must be cultivated.

He has already practiced the first form, he just needs to keep becoming proficient, and then he can practice the second form.

The second form of the Tiangang Battle Method is more powerful, but the difficulty of cultivation is naturally higher.

Although Ye Tian had refined the origin of the universe, he could practice the second form, but according to Ye Tian's estimate, it would take at least tens of thousands of years, and even if he used time to accelerate, it would take decades.

As a result, while Ye Tian was cultivating other aspects, he also occasionally comprehended the second form of Tiangang's battle method.

And just like that, year after year.

Time flies, and thousands of years pass in a flash.

In the past thousand years, the human race has become more and more prosperous, and the ghost race star field that it occupied at the beginning has gradually had a large number of human beings, and the strength of the human race has become stronger and stronger.

It is worth mentioning that the human race has given birth to another Heavenly Venerable and a Supreme Venerable, which is a fortunate thing.

And some new highnesses have also been born in the universe, and a terrifying Henggu-level Highness has also been born in the great god level, although it is not an invincible-level Henggu-level Highness, but it is much stronger than the ordinary first-grade Henggu-level Highness, infinitely close to the invincible-level Henggu-level Highness, and it is also the only Highness of the human race who is currently the most promising to step into the invincible-level Henggu-level Highness.

This Highness is Ye Tian's disciple - Zhou Tian, also known as His Highness the Heavenly Sword!

His Royal Highness's reputation was far inferior to Ye Tian in the eyes of the high-level of the human race, but in the eyes of ordinary cultivators in many star domains, His Royal Highness the Heavenly Sword was even better than Ye Tian.

The main reason is that Ye Tian's cultivation progress is too fast, and he hasn't done many tasks, and he hasn't accumulated much reputation.

And His Royal Highness the Heavenly Sword has been doing tasks in the major star fields of the Terran race, killing countless scum of the Terran race, and has accumulated a lot of reputation.

At the same time, His Highness the Heavenly Sword also made a great reputation among the various races in the universe, killing many His Highnesses of the various races, and his reputation was so great that he was even regarded as a thorn in the flesh by the various races!

However, this day.

Something has happened to His Royal Highness the Heavenly Sword!

......

Heavenly Pavilion.

Xiao Yue found Ye Tian who was in retreat.

"Husband, something happened to your disciple Zhou Tian!"

Xiao Yue said.

"What's wrong?"

Ye Tian frowned.

"Zhou Tian's body was shattered, and his soul was about to be annihilated, and although his soul was forcibly frozen by a master, he still couldn't save his soul. Now, Zhou Tian is in the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, because you are Zhou Tian's master, the Supreme Hall of the Terran sent people. Zhou Tian said that he wanted to see you before he died!"

Xiao Yue hurriedly said.

"What !!"

Ye Tian was extremely angry.

His only disciple was about to fall.

"I'll go to the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race right away!"

Ye Tian teleported away and rushed to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

Soon, Ye Tian entered the Supreme Hall of the Human Race and saw Zhou Tian, who was in the cultivation tower of the heaven-level region.

In a large hall.

Zhou Tian's illusory immortal soul sat there, next to a master and several cosmic gods.

Seeing Ye Tian, Zhou Tian forcibly pulled out a smile and said, "Master, I finally saw you!

Ye Tian saw Zhou Tian's state, and his heart was stunned.

The immortal soul core had been shattered, if it weren't for the fact that the master had been stabilizing Zhou Tian's immortal soul, Zhou Tian would have been annihilated in an instant.

"How so?"

Ye Tian asked.

Zhou Tian was too weak to speak anymore, and the master next to him said, "Wanfa True Monarch, it was one of the small clans that rebelled, and His Royal Highness the Heavenly Sword happened to be doing a mission in that small clan. We didn't expect that the small clan had already taken refuge in other big clans, and suddenly, several cosmic gods who protected Zhou Tian died in battle, and one of the masters was severely injured. The price of that master's desperate recreation only brought back the immortal soul that was about to be shattered by His Royal Highness the Heavenly Sword. "

"What about the little clan?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Erased by the Kungo Supreme!" said the Juggernaut.

"Which cosmic clan is behind it?"

Ye Tian took a deep breath.

"It's the Angel Clan!" said the Dominant: "The strength of the Angel Clan is still stronger than ours, and it is an old cosmic clan, and our human race has no choice but to help the Angel Clan." Therefore, I can only suffer this loss!"

"Damn angels!"

Ye Tian couldn't wait to destroy the Angel Clan, but his strength was still too weak, and he couldn't help the Angel Clan at all!

Immediately, he carefully examined Zhou Tian's immortal soul.

Even though he had obtained the Hades Secret Book and was very proficient in souls, there was no way to save Zhou Tian's situation.

"Terrans can't help it, can they?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No way!" the master shook his head, "The Kunwu Supreme also came to see it, indicating that it was powerless, this is not an ordinary injury, but a broken soul, even if you pay a big price, there is no way to cure such an injury, unless it is the soul supreme who makes a move, there is hope!"

"Soul Supreme!"

Ye Tian smiled bitterly, he was only at the level of a mortal general, his soul attainment was too far away from the soul supreme, and the soul attainment of other powerhouses of the human race was far inferior to him, and it was indeed hopeless to count on them.

"Master, I have no regrets, I can be famous for the human race, it's enough, but I can't repay the teachings of the master!"

Zhou Tian said weakly.

"Sunday, don't worry, I will resurrect you!"

Ye Tian assured.

"Wanfa True Monarch, His Royal Highness the Heavenly Sword is an Eternal Ancient Highness, the price of resurrecting him is not as simple as resurrecting an ordinary cosmic god, the price required is too great! Moreover, His Royal Highness the Heavenly Sword has not stored a trace of his soul with Zichen Wood, and now that it is too late to store it, the price will be even greater!" the master hurriedly said.

"I can only be resurrected, I don't care if it costs anything!"

Ye Tian said in a deep voice.

Seeing this, the master said no more.

At this time, Zhou Tian's immortal soul completely collapsed, and even the master could not be maintained.

After Zhou Tian died, Ye Tian went to find the Kunwu Supreme.

If he wants to resurrect an Eternal Highness, at least he has to be the Supreme to have a shot, and the ordinary Supreme can't do it, so he went to the Kunwu Supreme.

Soon, Ye Tian saw the Kunwu Supreme.

Kungo Temple.

"Ye Tian, I already know the purpose of your coming to me! You want to resurrect Zhou Tian, right?"

Kunwu Supreme was the first to ask.

"Yes, Kunwu Supreme!" Ye Tian said: "The human race can even resurrect the gods and masters of the universe, and resurrecting Zhou Tian should be able to do it, right?"

Kunwu Supreme said: "It can be resurrected, but the cost is very high. The reason why some cosmic gods and juggernauts were able to resurrect was that they stored a trace of their soul in the purple wood, and the cost was slightly smaller, but the price was also very large. Therefore, for example, the last time the Terran fell a lot of cosmic gods and masters, they all needed to be resurrected, but the Terran could not resurrect them at once, otherwise the strength of the Terran would be greatly damaged and would be destroyed by other cosmic clans. Therefore, it takes time for these people to be resurrected, that is, they need to queue up. Resurrect those with high status and deep backgrounds first, and then slowly resurrect other cosmic gods, and some cosmic gods even need to wait for tens of millions or even hundreds of millions of years. If you want to resurrect Sunday now, you can line up in the back, and you will be able to line up in hundreds of millions of years!"

"What, hundreds of millions of years?"

Ye Tian was stunned.

If he had to wait so long, why would he ask the other supremes of the human race to help, he himself would be able to resurrect Zhou Tian at that time.

"Kunwu Supreme, I can't wait that long, is there the fastest way?"

Ye Tian asked.

Kunwu Supreme pondered for a moment and said, "Yes!"
